summary: Iteration 115: Tested Duplicate Detection feature for Expenses and Supplier Payments. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI shows correct duplicate badges and detection working.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 115 verified all duplicate detection features. Both Expenses and Supplier Payments check-duplicate endpoints return proper has_duplicate (bool) and count (int) responses. UI shows orange duplicate badges correctly.

1_expense_check_duplicate_endpoint.details: GET /api/expenses/check-duplicate returns {has_duplicate: bool, count: int}. Filters by branch_id, amount, date, and optionally category. 5 tests passed.

2_supplier_payment_check_duplicate_endpo.details: GET /api/supplier-payments/check-duplicate returns {has_duplicate: bool, count: int}. Filters by supplier_id, amount, date. 4 tests passed.

3_expense_crud_duplicate_scenario.details: Created expense then verified check-duplicate finds it. Cleanup performed. 1 test passed.

4_supplier_payment_crud_duplicate_scenar.details: Created supplier payment then verified check-duplicate finds it. Cleanup performed. 1 test passed.

5_expenses_page_visual_duplicate_detecti.details: Expenses page shows 2 day-level duplicate warnings (Mar 04, 2026 and Feb 10, 2026 have orange 'Duplicate' badges with data-testid='exp-duplicate-warning-{dateKey}'). After expanding Mar 04 row, 6 individual entries show 'Possible duplicate' badges (data-testid='exp-duplicate-badge-{id}').

6_expenses_page_prevention_dialog.details: AlertDialog with data-testid='expense-duplicate-warning-dialog' is configured in code. Shows 'Cancel & Review' and 'Yes, Save Anyway' buttons. Triggers when creating expense with same branch_id + amount on same date as existing entry.

7_supplier_payments_visual_duplicate_det.details: Supplier Payments page has duplicate detection logic implemented. Code shows spDuplicateIds computed for same supplier_id + amount on same date. Rows with duplicates get orange background and data-testid='sp-duplicate-badge-{id}'. No duplicates in current test data.

8_supplier_payments_prevention_dialog.details: AlertDialog with data-testid='sp-duplicate-warning-dialog' is configured in code. Shows 'Cancel & Review' and 'Yes, Save Anyway' buttons. Triggers when creating payment with same supplier_id + amount on same date as existing entry.
